text_block_list.name: Sales Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Here's your fifty liters of fresh<n>cream. Thank
you for your patronage!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Thanks! See you again soon! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm free today, so the academy has<n>asked me to
chaperone a few of the<n>students' trip to the
farmer's market.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
This cream will help us make an<n>absolutely
buono cake! ☆

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I see! As a princess, I hope to<n>learn a great
deal today! ♪

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I'll make my prince fall head over<n>heels over
head again with a<n>homemade wedding cake!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
That sounds truly buono! ☆ I'll teach<n>you
everything you need to know!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Fifty liters of cream is quite the sight,<n>truth be
told.
choice_data_list: What are you going to do with all of it?
What are you going to do with all of it?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
We're going to use it all to make a<n>ginormous
wedding cake. 'Cause if<n>you're gonna bake,
why not bake<n>big?! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
As I try to calculate just how big this<n>cake is
going to be...

text_block_list.name: Farmer
text_block_list.text: Heyyy! Watch out!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Huh? That's one of the farmers.<n>What's going
on?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: STOMP, STOMP, STOMP!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Aaaah! It's a bull! And it's coming<n>this way!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
A bull with bloodshot eyes charges<n>towards us.
There's no time to<n>hesitate. As I desperately try
to get<n>the students out of harm's way...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Oh, my! What a feisty little fella!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Akebono?! Why are you just<n>standing there?!
You'll be sent flying!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I'll be fiiine! Come on, cutie, show me<n>whatcha
got!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Alley-oop!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono grapples the bull<n>straight on, then
lifts its massive body<n>up off the ground!

text_block_list.name: Escaped Bull
text_block_list.text: MOO?! MOOOOO?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
How is she that powerful?! Even the<n>bull's
bamboozled!
choice_data_list: Those moves! Are those from sumo wrestling?!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Buono. ♪ There, there, Mr. Bull. Be a<n>good boy
and calm down now.

text_block_list.name: Escaped Bull
text_block_list.text: Moo...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: She's calming it down with a hug!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Sorry for the wait! ☆ I had to take Mr.<n>Bull back to
his home!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
That was incredible, Akebono! I feel<n>so inspired
right now!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Maybe one day I'll be strong enough<n>to stop an
out-of-control car with my<n>prince inside!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Please! Teach me your ways! Take<n>me on as
your pupil!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Sure, no problem! First, if you want to<n>get bigger,
the hearty hot pot sumo<n>wrestlers eat is probably
the way to<n>go.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
After we're done baking, let's<n>celebrate your
initiation with some hot<n>pot and cake!
choice_data_list: Why not train like a real sumo wrestler?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I tell them that all that food sounds<n>like too much
for just two people.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you may be right. I have a pretty<n>big appetite,
but Kawakami might<n>struggle with those
portions...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Why don't we invite everyone<n>from our dorm
to eat with us?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Great idea! I'll do whatever I can to<n>help! ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, I can't wait to cook! Let's go<n>buy some
ingredients on our way<n>back home! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I follow after the enthusiastic pair and<n>help them
pick out ingredients.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The following day, everyone in Ritto<n>Dorm is
clutching their stomachs in<n>pain. It's pretty clear
that Hishi<n>Akebono went overboard with her
cooking again.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It's going to take more than a single<n>night for
Kawakami Princess to reach<n>bull-hoisting Hishi
Akebono's level.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I tell her that if she's serious, it'd<n>probably be
better to practice some<n>real sumo wrestler
techniques.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I see... Speaking of which, who taught<n>you your
moves, Akebono?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I've always been a fan of sumo.<n>As a kid,
I'd watch them training on<n>TV, then try to mimic
their moves!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Oh, right! I can teach you some of the<n>easier stuff
right now!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Please do!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
And so, the two of them sumo stomp<n>all the way
back to school...
